text: IRD Sri Lanka Tax Calendar 2026, based only on the PDF titled 'Tax Calendar 2026'. This file excludes the older 2024 preview text shown on the IRD web page and keeps only the 2026 month-by-month schedule. The source calendar is titled 'TAX CALENDAR - 2026 (Last Dates for Making Payments & Filing Returns)'. The related IRD page notes that if a due date falls on a public holiday, bank holiday, or any day the Department is not open to the public, the payment or return should be made on the immediately preceding working day.

January 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. January 1: period 25/26 IV, Betting and Gaming annual levy payment for 4th quarter 2025/2026. January 7: period 25/26 III, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 15% of turnover for December 2025. January 15: period 25120, APIT payment for December 2025, tax type 03; period 25120, AIT/WHT payment for December 2025, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others; period 2540, statement of stamp duty compounded for 4th quarter 2025; and period 25120, stamp duty compounded payment for 4th quarter 2025, tax type 60. January 20: period 25403, SSCL payment for December 2025, tax type 32; period 2540, SSCL return for 4th quarter 2025 covering October to December; period 25430, VAT payment for December 2025, tax type 70; period 25120, VAT on financial services payment for December 2025, tax type 75; period 25262, VAT on financial services 2nd interim estimate for 2025/2026 on a calendar year basis; and period 25/26 III, Betting and Gaming gross collection return for 3rd quarter 2025/2026. January 31: period 2543, VAT return monthly for December 2025; and period 2540, VAT return quarterly for 4th quarter 2025.

February 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. February 7: period 25/26 IV, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for January 2026. February 15: period 25263, Income Tax 3rd installment of year of assessment 2025/2026 with tax type codes 02 for corporate income tax, 05 for individual income tax, and 09 for partnership income tax; period 26010, APIT payment for January 2026, tax type 03; and period 26010, AIT/WHT payment for January 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. February 20: period 26101, SSCL payment for January 2026, tax type 32; period 26110, VAT payment for January 2026, tax type 70; and period 26010, VAT on financial services payment for January 2026, tax type 75. February 28: period 2611, VAT return monthly for January 2026.

March 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. March 7: period 25/26 IV, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for February 2026. March 15: period 26020, APIT payment for February 2026, tax type 03; and period 26020, AIT/WHT payment for February 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. March 20: period 26102, SSCL payment for February 2026, tax type 32; period 26120, VAT payment for February 2026, tax type 70; and period 26020, VAT on financial services payment for February 2026, tax type 75. March 31: period 2612, VAT return monthly for February 2026.

April 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. April 1: period 26/27 I, Betting and Gaming annual levy payment for 1st quarter 2026/2027. April 7: period 26/27 IV, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for March 2026. April 15: period 26030, APIT payment for March 2026, tax type 03; period 26030, AIT/WHT payment for March 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others; period 2610, statement of stamp duty compounded for 1st quarter 2026; and period 26030, stamp duty compounded payment for 1st quarter 2026, tax type 60. April 20: period 26103, SSCL payment for March 2026, tax type 32; period 2610, SSCL return for 1st quarter 2026 covering January to March 2026; period 26130, VAT payment for March 2026, tax type 70; period 26030, VAT on financial services payment for March 2026, tax type 75; period 25262, VAT on financial services 2nd interim estimate for 2025/2026 on an assessment year basis; and period 25/26 IV, Betting and Gaming gross collection return for 4th quarter 2025/2026. April 30: period 2613, VAT return monthly for March 2026; period 2610, VAT return 1st quarter for January to March 2026; period 2526, AIT/WHT annual statement for year of assessment 2025/2026; and period 2526, APIT annual statement of employers for 2025/2026.

May 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. May 7: period 26/27 I, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for April 2026. May 15: period 25264, Income Tax 4th installment of year of assessment 2025/2026 with tax type codes 02 for corporate income tax, 05 for individual income tax, and 09 for partnership income tax; period 26040, APIT payment for April 2026, tax type 03; and period 26040, AIT/WHT payment for April 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. May 20: period 26201, SSCL payment for April 2026, tax type 32; period 26210, VAT payment for April 2026, tax type 70; and period 26040, VAT on financial services payment for April 2026, tax type 75. May 31: period 2621, VAT return monthly for April 2026.

June 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. June 7: period 26/27 I, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for May 2026. June 15: period 26050, APIT payment for May 2026, tax type 03; and period 26050, AIT/WHT payment for May 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. June 20: period 26202, SSCL payment for May 2026, tax type 32; period 26220, VAT payment for May 2026, tax type 70; and period 26050, VAT on financial services payment for May 2026, tax type 75. June 30: period 2622, VAT return monthly for May 2026; period 25260, VAT on financial services final payment for taxable period 2025/2026 on a calendar year basis, tax type 75; and period 2526, VAT on financial services return on a calendar year basis.

July 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. July 1: period 26/27 II, Betting and Gaming annual levy payment for 2nd quarter 2026/2027. July 7: period 26/27 I, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for June 2026. July 15: period 26060, APIT payment for June 2026, tax type 03; period 26060, AIT/WHT payment for June 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others; period 2620, statement of stamp duty compounded for 2nd quarter 2026; and period 26060, stamp duty compounded payment for 2nd quarter 2026, tax type 60. July 20: period 26203, SSCL payment for June 2026, tax type 32; period 2620, SSCL return for 2nd quarter 2026; period 26230, VAT payment for June 2026, tax type 70; period 26060, VAT on financial services payment for June 2026, tax type 75; period 26271, VAT on financial services 1st interim estimate for 2026/2027 on a calendar year basis; and period 26/27 I, Betting and Gaming gross collection return for 1st quarter 2026/2027. July 31: period 2623, VAT return monthly for June 2026; and period 2620, VAT return 2nd quarter for April to June 2026.

August 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. August 7: period 26/27 II, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for July 2026. August 15: period 26271, Income Tax 1st installment of year of assessment 2026/2027 with tax type codes 02 for corporate income tax, 05 for individual income tax, and 09 for partnership income tax; period 2627, Statement of Estimated Tax for year of assessment 2026/2027; period 26070, APIT payment for July 2026, tax type 03; and period 26070, AIT/WHT payment for July 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. August 20: period 26301, SSCL payment for July 2026, tax type 32; period 26310, VAT payment for July 2026, tax type 70; and period 26070, VAT on financial services payment for July 2026, tax type 75. August 31: period 2631, VAT return monthly for July 2026.

September 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. September 7: period 26/27 II, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for August 2026. September 15: period 26080, APIT payment for August 2026, tax type 03; and period 26080, AIT/WHT payment for August 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. September 20: period 26302, SSCL payment for August 2026, tax type 32; period 26320, VAT payment for August 2026, tax type 70; and period 26080, VAT on financial services payment for August 2026, tax type 75. September 30: period 25260, final Income Tax payment for year of assessment 2025/2026 with tax type codes 02 for corporate income tax, 05 for individual income tax, and 09 for partnership income tax; period 2632, VAT return monthly for August 2026; period 25260, VAT on financial services final payment for taxable period 2025/2026 on an assessment year basis, tax type 75; and period 2526, VAT on financial services return on an assessment year basis for April 2025 to March 2026.

October 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. October 1: period 26/27 III, Betting and Gaming annual levy payment for 3rd quarter 2026/2027. October 7: period 26/27 II, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for September 2026. October 15: period 26090, APIT payment for September 2026, tax type 03; period 26090, AIT/WHT payment for September 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others; and period 2630, statement of stamp duty compounded for 3rd quarter 2026. October 20: period 26090, stamp duty compounded payment for 3rd quarter 2026, tax type 60; period 26303, SSCL payment for September 2026, tax type 32; period 2630, SSCL return for 3rd quarter 2026 covering July to September 2026; period 26330, VAT payment for September 2026, tax type 70; period 26090, VAT on financial services payment for September 2026, tax type 75; period 26271, VAT on financial services 1st interim estimate for 2026/2027 on an assessment year basis; and period 26/27 II, Betting and Gaming gross collection return for 2nd quarter 2026/2027. October 31: period 2633, VAT return monthly for September 2026; and period 2630, VAT return quarterly for July to September 2026.

November 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. November 7: period 26/27 III, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for October 2026. November 15: period 26272, Income Tax 2nd installment of year of assessment 2026/2027 with tax type codes 02 for corporate income tax, 05 for individual income tax, and 09 for partnership income tax; period 26100, APIT payment for October 2026, tax type 03; and period 26100, AIT/WHT payment for October 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. November 20: period 26401, SSCL payment for October 2026, tax type 32; period 26410, VAT payment for October 2026, tax type 70; and period 26100, VAT on financial services payment for October 2026, tax type 75. November 30: period 2526, Income Tax return for year of assessment 2025/2026 with tax type codes 02 for corporate income tax, 05 for individual income tax, and 09 for partnership income tax; and period 2641, VAT return monthly for October 2026.

December 2026 due dates from the Tax Calendar 2026 PDF. December 7: period 26/27 III, Betting and Gaming gross collection payment at 18% of turnover for November 2026. December 15: period 26110, APIT payment for November 2026, tax type 03; and period 26110, AIT/WHT payment for November 2026, tax type 43 on interest and tax type 44 on fees and others. December 20: period 26402, SSCL payment for November 2026, tax type 32; period 26420, VAT payment for November 2026, tax type 70; and period 26110, VAT on financial services payment for November 2026, tax type 75. December 31: period 2642, VAT return monthly for November 2026.
